{{Quote|This sure is a good candle. It never burns down.|[[Cindel Towani]]|<ref name="Caravan" />}}
The '''Candle of Pure Light''' was a sacred [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] item bestowed to [[Cindel Towani]] by the Ewok [[Shaman/Legends|shaman]] [[Logray/Legends|Logray]] before the expedition to save her parents from the [[Gorax/Legends|Gorax]] around [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].<ref name="Caravan" />

It could be used to summon [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Izrina]], of the [[Wistie/Legends|Wisties]], when she needed help.<ref name="Caravan" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure]]'' {{1st}}
